name: azuregov-ide-coding-assistant
description: Azure-native AI coding agent for CMMC/CUI - Azure OpenAI Responses API in Azure US Government. Code context never leaves the Gov boundary.
author: Entropex, LLC (https://entropex.io)

chatParticipants.name: azgov
chatParticipants.description: In-boundary coding agent (Azure OpenAI, US Gov). Ask me to explain, edit, or run tasks.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain the selected code or a file

commands.name: fix
commands.description: Propose a fix for the current problem or selection

azgovIde.endpoint.markdownDescription: Azure OpenAI **Gov** endpoint (`*.openai.azure.us`). Org admins can lock this via policy (GPO/Intune).

enumDescriptions: Fast workhorse - everyday edits, explain, quick fixes
azgovIde.model.description: Model deployment. Pick by task complexity (also switchable from the status bar).

enumDescriptions: Azure VM managed identity via local metadata (no sign-in; best for in-boundary VMs/PAWs)
Keyless Microsoft Entra ID via device code (sign in with a code on any device)
Break-glass API key stored in SecretStorage
azgovIde.authMode.markdownDescription: Authentication to the Gov endpoint. `managed` uses the Azure VM's managed identity (no interactive sign-in); the VM identity must hold the **Cognitive Services OpenAI User** role. `entra` uses the device-code flow. `key` uses a stored API key. Org admins can lock this via policy.

azgovIde.tenantId.description: Entra tenant ID (GUID) to pin for keyless auth. Optional.

azgovIde.store.markdownDescription: Persist server-side conversation state. **Keep false for CMMC/CUI**: no conversation state at rest in Azure. Org admins can lock this via policy.

azgovIde.approveWrites.description: Require confirmation before file writes and terminal commands (ignored in Auto mode). Org admins can lock this via policy.

azgovIde.auditEnabled.markdownDescription: Write a tamper-evident, hash-chained audit log of every agent action (model calls, tool calls, file changes, approvals) with the resolved identity. Required for CMMC AU controls. Org admins can lock this on via policy.

azgovIde.autoCompactTokens.markdownDescription: Auto-compact the conversation when its estimated size exceeds this many tokens (summarizes older context to free tokens/cost). Set to `0` to disable. You can also type `/compact` anytime.

azgovIde.pricing.markdownDescription: Per-model price in USD **per 1,000,000 tokens**, used to estimate spend. Override the built-in estimates with your actual Azure Government contract rates, e.g. `{ "gpt-4.1": { "input": 2.0, "output": 8.0 } }`.

azgovIde.allowedEndpointHosts.markdownDescription: Additional approved endpoint hosts besides `*.openai.azure.us` (for example a private hostname). The agent refuses any endpoint whose host is not allowed, so CUI cannot be sent outside the boundary.

azgovIde.allowedModels.markdownDescription: Org-approved model deployment names. The agent refuses models not on this list. An empty list disables the check.

commands.title: AzureGov IDE: Set break-glass API key
AzureGov IDE: Clear break-glass API key
AzureGov IDE: Verify audit log integrity
